scores.correctness_notes: Accurately describes CollectStatusEvent, priority order (with minor ordering discrepancy: gold standard says error > blocked > maintenance > waiting > active, but agent says error > blocked > waiting > maintenance > active), observe pattern, add_status() usage, collect_unit_status vs collect_app_status distinction, and leader-only behavior for app status.
scores.hallucination_notes: Priority order is listed incorrectly (waiting before maintenance instead of maintenance before waiting). The testing section references harness.evaluate_status() which appears valid, but the test setup with StoredState flags using instance variables (_installed, _service_running) as internal state is a simplified/illustrative pattern not typical of real ops charms. Minor inaccuracy in priority order constitutes a factual error rather than a hallucinated API.
